Time to change I/O Scheduler on eeepc 900..(not only on it)

Yes you can, It’s not only a great political slogan.. Does Heavy Disk I/O harm your system responsiveness? (Do Firefox and other apps become unresponsive when using I/O on SSD?) There is a “little” workaround: change your I/O Scheduler! You can change I/O Scheduler of your kernel on eeepc 900...

no title

Plan a transit trip in cities around the world with Google Maps. Get step-by-step directions and travel times for your entire route, all in one place online. Many cities supported, you can find also Italian cities on the list: http://maps.google.com/transit (Firenze, Genova, Torino).

The Firefox add-on China Channel offers internet users outside of China the ability to surf the web as if they were inside mainland China. Take an unforgetable virtual trip to China and experience the technical expertise of the Chinese Ministry of Information Industry (supported by western companies). It’s open source,...

Instant Messaging is dying..

Msn and the other Instant Messaging network are destined to die. I’m sorry but people don’t need them much more.. People needs more a Social Network then a single Instant Messaging, People has always much less time to write to his friends, hasn’t time to have a chat or a...
